nasb.text: The priests shall not eat any bird or beast that has died a natural death or has been torn to pieces.

esv.text: The priests shall not eat of anything, whether bird or beast, that has died of itself or is torn by wild animals.

cnv.text: 無論是飛鳥或是走獸，凡是自然死的，或是被撕裂的，祭司都不可吃。

ccb.text: 无论是自然死亡的，还是被其他野兽咬死的禽兽，祭司都不可吃。
